name: codex-dev-rigor-stack
description: Codex Desktop packaging of the dev-rigor-stack skillset: six pull-based Codex skills for proof-oriented delivery, with Claude-only hooks intentionally left unwired.

skills.name: dev-rigor-stack
skills.role: orchestrates the delivery loop and release gate

skills.name: coder-tdd-qa
skills.role: BUILD gate: test-first engineering and QA standards

skills.name: audit-lite
skills.role: REVIEW lane: fast single-pass audit of a small change

skills.name: audit-team
skills.role: REVIEW lane: multi-role deep audit for high-blast units

skills.name: gauntletgate
skills.role: REVIEW lane and release gate: adversarial stage gate

codex.hooks: not wired by default; upstream Claude hooks need a Codex-native port before enabling
